title: buddleja polycephala var. peruviana
intro: Buddleja polycephala var. peruviana, also known as Peruvian Butterfly Bush, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Buddleja genus, characterized by its long, conical panicles of small flowers. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe various health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Buddleja polycephala var. peruviana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
